title: Completion message fires on workflow failure — misleading success message
body: workflow-executor.ts else branch at line 947 handled completed and failed status identically. resolveCompletion() ran unconditionally when spec.completion existed. Static completion.message strings like "Handoff captured to .project/handoff.json" fired on failure even though nothing was written. All workflow specs with completion messages assumed success — none checked ${{ status }}. formatResult() already correctly renders failure but was bypassed when spec.completion was present.
resolved_by: v0.11.3 commit b614be4 — added state.status === "completed" guard to completion condition
